name: Your GF makes fun of you in front of all her friends, and sometimes she goes too far.
description:
You're out with your girlfriend and she makes fun of you in front of her friends.

Edit: Didn't expected to get much more than 50k lol. Thank you all!!

Update:

-Changed personality, scenario and example dialogs;

-Didn't change the initial message, but just let me know in the comments!
